footer.tagline: Creating authentic Thai adventures and lifelong memories for over {years} years. Founded by {founder}.

cta.title: Let's Plan Your Perfect Thai Adventure Together
cta.subtitle: Schedule a free 15-minute call to discuss your travel plans. We'll listen and start crafting your personalised experience.
cta.consultSubtitle: During this brief call, we'll discuss:

flights.title: We Find You the Best Fares
flights.subtitle: International and domestic flights at competitive rates. Our local knowledge of Thai carriers means better options and savings for you.

accommodation.title: Handpicked Stays Across Thailand
accommodation.subtitle: Carefully selected properties at every budget, from five-star resorts to authentic local homestays.

cars.title: Private Transfers & Car Hire
cars.subtitle: Safe, comfortable, and reliable transport across Thailand. Airport pickups, city transfers, and multi-day hire available.

medical.title: Your Gateway to World-Class Thai Healthcare
medical.subtitle: We connect you with Thailand's leading hospitals and specialists. Rising Sun acts as your personal coordinator, handling the match, the booking, and the logistics.
medical.step1Desc: Fill in the form below with your medical specialty and a brief description.
medical.step2Title: We match you with the right specialist
medical.step2Desc: Salim personally reviews your inquiry and connects you with the most suitable hospital or doctor.
medical.step3Desc: Consultation, travel, accommodation, and logistics. All coordinated for you.
medical.privacy: All communications are private and secure. No medical data is stored on this website.
medical.emergency: If this is a medical emergency, please contact your local emergency services immediately.

trade.title: Thai Trade & Export Solutions
trade.subtitle: Connecting businesses with verified Thai suppliers and facilitating seamless export/import operations since 2006.
trade.exportDesc: Thai food products, textiles, ceramics, wellness products, herbs, and furniture, sourced from verified suppliers.
trade.importDesc: Electronics, machinery, raw materials, and consumer goods. We handle customs coordination and local logistics.
trade.teaserDesc: Sourcing, export, and import services for businesses worldwide.

about.title: 20+ Years of Creating Unforgettable Thai Experiences
about.description1: Rising Sun was founded in 2006 by Md Salim Jahangir, who had a vision to share the authentic beauty and culture of Thailand with travelers from around the world. What started as a small local guide service has grown into a full-service travel company with deep local connections throughout Thailand.
about.founderQuote: Our mission is to showcase the real Thailand through the eyes of locals.
about.description2: Unlike large international agencies, we offer a personal touch with the insider knowledge that only comes from decades of local experience. Every itinerary is crafted with care, attention to detail, and a deep understanding of what makes Thailand special.
about.journeySubtitle: Milestones from our 20+ years in Thai tourism

2006.title: Humble Beginnings
2006.description: Rising Sun was founded as a small local guide service in Bangkok.

2018.title: Digital Transformation
2018.description: Launched online booking platform to serve international clients better.

destinations.heading: Where Do You Want to Go?
destinations.subheading: From Bangkok's temples to the southern islands, we know every corner of Thailand.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subheading: Three steps from first contact to your dream holiday.
howItWorks.step1Body: Book a free 15-minute call. Tell us where you want to go, when, and what matters most to you.
howItWorks.step2Body: Salim personally designs your itinerary: flights, stays, experiences, and medical needs if required.
howItWorks.step3Body: Everything is arranged. You show up and enjoy Thailand. We're reachable the entire time.

blog.previewSubheading: Practical, honest advice on visiting Thailand, written from 20+ years on the ground.
